**Immediate Actions:**
- Delete 80% of each command (scientifically calculated reduction needed)

**Replacement Solutions:**
```bash
# Your 398-line adhd-context-switch becomes:

# Your 530-line git-backup-sync becomes:

# Your 535-line ultrathink-hybrid becomes:
# Just... think normally. Delete this.
```
